scripts.db:push: dotenv -e apps/api/.env -- npx prisma db push --schema apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate: dotenv -e apps/api/.env -- npx prisma migrate dev --schema apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:studio: dotenv -e apps/api/.env -- npx prisma studio --schema apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:reset: dotenv -e apps/api/.env -- npx prisma db push --force-reset --schema apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma
